title: Parametric Radius Helps Accelerate Asset Growth
text: Parametric, part of Morgan Stanley Investment Management, announced that Radius, its proprietary integrated multi-asset technology platform, contributed to more than 19% asset growth and account growth in its first year. Radius launched in January 2025 and is designed to support customized multi-asset portfolios from onboarding through account management and reporting. The platform uses cloud-native scale to analyze hundreds of thousands of portfolios every day, increase trading capacity, improve reporting, simplify client onboarding, and automate workflows that previously required more manual processing. This news is useful evidence for Morgan Stanley because it connects the Investment Management business to technology-enabled growth, direct indexing, tax management, and customized portfolio solutions. It also supports the case that Morgan Stanley can improve operating scale and client service through internal technology platforms, although success depends on continued adoption and execution.
